articles.author: Ethan Beck, Geoff Edgers
articles.title: Over half of Great American State Fair performers drop out over politics, threats - The Washington Post
articles.description: Bret Michaels and Martina McBride are the latest artists to pull out of the Great American State Fair concert series organized by Freedom 250 on the National Mall this summer.
articles.content:
More than half the performers slated for the Great American State Fair concert series to be held this summer on the National Mall have pulled out, citing the events political associations.

articles.author: Rael Ombuor, Lena H. Sun
articles.title: A court in Kenya blocks U.S. plan to keep American Ebola patients in Africa - The Washington Post
articles.description: A facility built by the U.S. military on a Kenyan air base was intended to isolate Americans exposed to Ebola during the growing outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo.
articles.content:
NAIROBI A Kenyan court Friday suspended a Trump administration plan to establish a makeshift field hospital in Kenya to quarantine and treat Americans exposed to or infected with Ebola.

articles.title: Hantavirus-exposed cruise passengers may soon be allowed to return home but must remain under 24/7 watch - CNN

articles.content:
